goal: Fix broken agent status detection so the game correctly maps all 7 server statuses to visual behaviors instead of collapsing everything to working or offline

risks: Expanding AgentStatus type will cause TypeScript errors in all 14 files that reference it — need to update every switch/record/comparison
The statusIcons.ts and renderer.ts may not have visual assets for new statuses (done, paused, error) — builder must verify icon coverage
Character FSM in officeState.ts and characters.ts may have behavior branches gated on the old 2-value type that break with new values
over_engineering_flags: Tempting to redesign the entire status pipeline end-to-end — this should stay scoped to the frontend mapping layer only
No need to touch server-side status detection — the server already produces all 7 statuses correctly
challenges.recommendation: Proceed as-is — this is a focused type expansion + mapping fix with clear boundaries

projects.title: Fix AgentStatus type and mapping to support all server statuses
projects.scope_summary: Expand AgentStatus from 'working' | 'idle' to include 'done', 'paused', 'error', and 'offline'. Fix toAgentStatus() to map all 7 server statuses correctly instead of collapsing to 2. Add 'offline' to the priority record and fix the fallback comparison so agents with non-working sessions correctly show as idle/done/paused/error. Update all consumers across the 14 game files that reference AgentStatus.
